audit_status.source_base: Greek Acts text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for temple healing at Beautiful Gate, name of Jesus Messiah, walking/leaping/praising, Peter's Solomon Portico speech, Author of life, turning and restoration times.

verses.restored: Peter and John were going up into the temple at the hour of prayer, the ninth.
A certain man, lame from his mother's womb, was being carried, whom they placed day by day at the gate of the temple called Beautiful, to ask alms from those entering the temple.
Seeing Peter and John about to enter the temple, he was asking to receive alms.
Peter, fixing his gaze on him with John, said, Look at us.
He held attention on them, expecting to receive something from them.
Peter said, Silver and gold do not belong to me; but what I have, this I give to you: in the name of Jesus Messiah the Nazarene, walk.
Taking him by the right hand, he raised him; immediately his feet and ankles were strengthened.
Leaping up, he stood and began walking, and entered with them into the temple, walking and leaping and praising the Divine.
All the people saw him walking and praising the Divine.
They recognized him as the one sitting for alms at the Beautiful Gate of the temple, and they were filled with wonder and astonishment at what had happened to him.
While he held Peter and John, all the people ran together to them at the portico called Solomon's, utterly amazed.
Seeing this, Peter answered the people, Men of Israel, why do you marvel at this, or why do you stare at us, as if by our own power or reverence we made him walk?
The Divine of Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob, the Divine of our fathers, glorified his servant/child Jesus, whom you handed over and denied before Pilate, though that one had judged to release him.
But you denied the Holy and Righteous One and asked that a man who was a murderer be granted to you.
You killed the Author/Leader of life, whom the Divine raised from the dead; of this we are witnesses.
And by trust in his name, his name strengthened this one whom you behold and know; the trust through him gave this complete wholeness before all of you.
Now, siblings, I know that you acted in ignorance, just as also your rulers did.
But what the Divine announced beforehand through the mouth of all the prophets, that his Messiah would suffer, he fulfilled in this way.
Turn/realign therefore and return, for your sins/misalignments to be wiped away, so that seasons of refreshing may come from the face of the Lord,
and that he may send the one appointed for you, Messiah Jesus,
whom heaven must receive until times of restoration of all things, of which the Divine spoke through the mouth of his holy prophets from the age.
Moses indeed said, The Lord your Divine will raise up for you a prophet like me from your siblings; you shall hear him according to all things whatever he speaks to you.
It will be that every soul/life that does not hear that prophet will be utterly removed from the people.
And all the prophets from Samuel and those after him, as many as spoke, also announced these days.
You are sons/children of the prophets and of the covenant that the Divine made with your fathers, saying to Abraham, In your seed all the families of the earth will be blessed.
To you first, the Divine, having raised up his servant/child, sent him blessing you by turning each of you away from your harmful ways.
